name: glassbox-autofit
description: White-box AutoML: upload a CSV, name the target column, and I'll run EDA → Preprocessing → Model Selection → Hyperparameter Search and return the best model with a full explainability report.

agent.welcome_description: Upload a CSV file and tell me which column to predict. I'll handle everything: data inspection, cleaning, model selection, and hyperparameter tuning — all with NumPy, no black-box libraries.
